mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_record (user_id, session_id, role, content, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, now())

INSERT INTO ai_chat_session (user_id, session_id, title, message_count, last_message_at, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{title}, 0, now(), '活跃', now(), now()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_message_at = now(), update_time = now()
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_session SET message_count = message_count + #{count}, last_message_at = now(), update_time = now() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT session_id, title, message_count, last_message_at, create_time FROM ai_chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = '活跃' ORDER BY last_message_at DESC
